findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name RootedFileSystemProvider path operations
 * @description Examine path operations in RootedFileSystemProvider
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/rooted-fs-path-ops
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.sshd.common.file.root", "RootedFileSystemProvider") and
  (
    mc.getMethod().hasName("resolve") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("normalize") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("toAbsolutePath") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("toRealPath") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("startsWith")
  )
select mc, "Path op " + mc.getMethod().getName() + " in " + mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName()

/**
 * @name File construction from user-controlled input in SSHD
 * @description Paths constructed from user data may allow traversal to unauthorized directories
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/sshd-file-from-user-input
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

from ClassInstanceExpr cie
where
  cie.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "File") and
  cie.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getPackage().getName().matches("org.apache.sshd%")
select cie, "File constructed in " + cie.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getQualifiedName() + "." + cie.getEnclosingCallable().getName()
findings.hypothesis: File objects constructed from user-supplied paths without sufficient validation

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name ScpHelper path resolution methods
 * @description Examine path resolution in SCP helper for traversal vulnerabilities
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/scp-helper-path-resolution
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.sshd.scp.common", "ScpHelper") and
  (
    mc.getMethod().hasName("resolve") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("normalize") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("toAbsolutePath") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("toRealPath") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("startsWith") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("chroot") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("resolveLocalPath") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("getPath")
  )
select mc, "Line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine() + ": " + mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() + " -> " + mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + mc.getMethod().getName()

/**
 * @name ScpShell path containment without toRealPath
 * @description ScpShell uses Path.startsWith() for containment in setFileSystemFactory but never calls toRealPath()
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/scpshell-path-containment
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

// Find all method calls in ScpShell.setFileSystemFactory
from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.sshd.scp.server", "ScpShell") and
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().hasName("setFileSystemFactory")
select mc, "Line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine() + ": " + mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + mc.getMethod().getName()

/**
 * @name VirtualFileSystemFactory getUserHomeDir used without symlink check
 * @description Examine how VirtualFileSystemFactory creates roots used in containment checks
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/vfs-factory-root
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.sshd.common.file.virtualfs", "VirtualFileSystemFactory") and
  (
    mc.getMethod().hasName("toRealPath") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("normalize") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("toAbsolutePath") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("createFileSystem") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("getUserHomeDir")
  )
select mc, "Line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine() + ": [" + mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() + "] " + mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + mc.getMethod().getName()
findings.hypothesis: VirtualFileSystemFactory does not call toRealPath() when establishing the root for containment

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name RootedFileSystemProvider resolveLocalPath - path normalization before containment check
 * @description Check if paths are normalized before the startsWith containment check in resolveLocalPath
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/rooted-fs-resolve-local-path
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

// Look at the resolveLocalPath method in detail - what operations happen before startsWith check
from Method m
where
  m.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.sshd.common.file.root", "RootedFileSystemProvider") and
  m.hasName("resolveLocalPath")
select m, "resolveLocalPath method body in RootedFileSystemProvider at " + m.getFile().getRelativePath() + " line " + m.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: resolveLocalPath in RootedFileSystemProvider may not properly normalize paths before containment check

message.text: resolveLocalPath method body in RootedFileSystemProvider at sshd-common/src/main/java/org/apache/sshd/common/file/root/RootedFileSystemProvider.java line 556

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name All method calls in RootedFileSystemProvider.resolveLocalPath
 * @description Enumerate all method calls in resolveLocalPath to understand path processing order
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/rooted-fs-resolve-calls
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.sshd.common.file.root", "RootedFileSystemProvider") and
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().hasName("resolveLocalPath")
select mc, "Line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine() + ": " + mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + mc.getMethod().getName()
findings.hypothesis: Investigate path processing order in resolveLocalPath

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name All method calls in RootedFileSystemProvider root method
 * @description Enumerate all method calls in root() to understand path processing order
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/rooted-fs-root-calls
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.sshd.common.file.root", "RootedFileSystemProvider") and
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().hasName("root")
select mc, "Line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine() + ": " + mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + mc.getMethod().getName()
findings.hypothesis: Investigate path processing order in root() method

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name IoUtils.chroot method implementation
 * @description Examine how IoUtils.chroot resolves paths - does it use normalize() or toRealPath()?
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/ioutils-chroot-impl
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.sshd.common.util.io", "IoUtils") and
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().hasName("chroot")
select mc, "Line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine() + ": " + mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + mc.getMethod().getName()
findings.hypothesis: IoUtils.chroot may use normalize() instead of toRealPath() allowing symlink-based traversal

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AbstractSftpSubsystemHelper path resolution methods
 * @description Examine path resolution in SFTP subsystem for traversal vulnerabilities
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/sftp-path-resolution
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.sshd.sftp.server", "AbstractSftpSubsystemHelper") and
  (
    mc.getMethod().hasName("resolve") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("normalize") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("toAbsolutePath") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("toRealPath") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("startsWith") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("chroot") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("resolveLocalPath")
  )
select mc, "Line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine() + ": " + mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() + " -> " + mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + mc.getMethod().getName()
findings.hypothesis: SFTP path resolution may be susceptible to traversal

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name IoUtils.removeExtraCdUps and buildPath implementation
 * @description Examine if path normalization is purely lexical (no symlink resolution)
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/ioutils-remove-cdups
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.sshd.common.util.io", "IoUtils") and
  (
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().hasName("removeExtraCdUps") or
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().hasName("buildPath") or
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().hasName("chroot")
  )
select mc, "Line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine() + ": [" + mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() + "] " + mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + mc.getMethod().getName()
findings.hypothesis: IoUtils path normalization is purely lexical - no symlink resolution via toRealPath()

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Absence of toRealPath in path resolution chain
 * @description Find methods that do path containment checks but never call toRealPath()
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/missing-torealpath
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

// Find methods that call startsWith (containment check) but NOT toRealPath
from Method m
where
  m.getDeclaringType().getPackage().getName().matches("org.apache.sshd%") and
  // method calls startsWith for containment
  exists(MethodCall startsWithCall |
    startsWithCall.getEnclosingCallable() = m and
    startsWithCall.getMethod().hasName("startsWith") and
    startsWithCall.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName("java.nio.file", "Path")
  ) and
  // but does NOT call toRealPath
  not exists(MethodCall realPathCall |
    realPathCall.getEnclosingCallable() = m and
    realPathCall.getMethod().hasName("toRealPath")
  )
select m, "Method " + m.getDeclaringType().getQualifiedName() + "." + m.getName() + " uses Path.startsWith() for containment but never calls toRealPath()"
findings.hypothesis: Path containment checks without toRealPath() allow symlink-based traversal

message.text: Method org.apache.sshd.common.file.root.RootedFileSystemProvider.resolveLocalPath uses Path.startsWith() for containment but never calls toRealPath()
Method org.apache.sshd.common.file.root.RootedFileSystemProvider.root uses Path.startsWith() for containment but never calls toRealPath()
Method org.apache.sshd.common.file.root.RootedFileSystemProvider.getFileSystem uses Path.startsWith() for containment but never calls toRealPath()
Method org.apache.sshd.common.file.util.BasePath.startsWith uses Path.startsWith() for containment but never calls toRealPath()
Method org.apache.sshd.common.file.util.BasePath.startsWith uses Path.startsWith() for containment but never calls toRealPath()
Method org.apache.sshd.common.file.util.MockPath.startsWith uses Path.startsWith() for containment but never calls toRealPath()
Method org.apache.sshd.scp.server.ScpShell.setFileSystemFactory uses Path.startsWith() for containment but never calls toRealPath()

findings.hypothesis: SFTP user-supplied paths flow to filesystem operations without proper validation

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Symlink creation in SFTP without path re-validation
 * @description SFTP allows creation of symlinks; if traversal checks don't re-validate after symlink resolution, path escape is possible
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/sftp-symlink-path-escape
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

// Find symlink creation in SFTP
from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.sshd.sftp.server", "AbstractSftpSubsystemHelper") and
  (
    mc.getMethod().hasName("createSymbolicLink") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("createLink") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("readSymbolicLink") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("createHardLink")
  )
select mc, "Line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine() + ": symlink/link operation in SFTP: " + mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() + " -> " + mc.getMethod().getName()
findings.hypothesis: SFTP symlink creation/reading without re-validation allows path escape via symlink traversal

message.text: Line 772: symlink/link operation in SFTP: doLink -> createLink
Line 794: symlink/link operation in SFTP: doSymLink -> createLink
Line 838: symlink/link operation in SFTP: doOpenSSHHardLink -> createLink

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name SFTP doLink/doSymLink - normalizeLocation called before createLink
 * @description Check whether resolveNormalizedLocation/normalize is called in doLink/doSymLink before createLink
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/sftp-link-normalize-check
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.sshd.sftp.server", "AbstractSftpSubsystemHelper") and
  (
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().hasName("doLink") or
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().hasName("doSymLink") or
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().hasName("doOpenSSHHardLink")
  ) and
  (
    mc.getMethod().hasName("normalize") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("resolveNormalizedLocation") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("toRealPath") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("resolveLocalPath") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("getString") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("createLink")
  )
select mc, "Line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine() + ": [" + mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() + "] " + mc.getMethod().getName()
findings.hypothesis: doLink/doSymLink read network paths then create symlinks - checking if path validation occurs

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name IoUtils.chroot - confirm no toRealPath call in entire chain
 * @description Verify that the chroot+buildPath chain never calls toRealPath to resolve symlinks
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/ioutils-no-realpath
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

// Find all toRealPath calls anywhere in IoUtils to confirm absence
from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getMethod().hasName("toRealPath") and
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getPackage().getName().matches("org.apache.sshd%") and
  // Only in security-relevant classes  
  (
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.sshd.common.util.io", "IoUtils") or
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.sshd.common.file.root", "RootedFileSystemProvider") or
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.sshd.sftp.server", "AbstractSftpSubsystemHelper") or
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.sshd.scp.common", "ScpHelper")
  )
select mc, "toRealPath FOUND in " + mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getQualifiedName() + "." + mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() + " at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: Confirming complete absence of toRealPath in the path resolution chain
